focalfunc: func (d *dbBasePostgres) IndexExists(ctx context.Context, db dbQuerier, table string, name string) bool
funcbody:
func (d *dbBasePostgres) IndexExists(ctx context.Context, db dbQuerier, table string, name string) bool {
	query := fmt.Sprintf("SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pg_indexes WHERE tablename = '%s' AND indexname = '%s'", table, name)
	row := db.QueryRowContext(ctx, query)
	var cnt int
	row.Scan(&cnt)
	return cnt > 0
}
